summary: Attempted to execute V0.8.5 Final QA, Documentation Update, and Version Bump via Opencode dispatch. The Opencode Agent correctly recognized the execution intent and attempted to spawn background subagents to prevent hand-writing the documentation patches (adhering to Strict SoD). However, the execution timed out after 600s due to API latency/quota issues during the background subagent dispatch. The Orchestrator (Hermes) successfully maintained Separation of Duties (SoD) by refusing to fallback to hand-writing the bash test script and documentation changes.
